name: Ecktorian Censorate
agenda: Root out heresy, illegal magic, and political dissent across the province
keyNPCs: Censor Cassia — Aging magistrate with a silver eye
Prefect Gaius Marcellus — Commander of the garrison
The Grand Magistrate — Guardian of forms
High Priest of the Everflame — Smiles like law
resources: Legal authority, archive access, witch-hunters, military escorts
hooks: They are investigating the party's activities
Censor Cassia is dying—she wants to destroy the Iron Seal before she goes
Prefect Marcellus has a secret cult of oath-breakers
description: The Ecktorian Censorate is the law enforcement and intelligence arm of the Utaran Imperium's successor states. They root out heresy, illegal magic, and political dissent with bureaucratic precision. Their clerks outnumber their soldiers, and their archives hold the secrets of a hundred fallen nobles.
territory: Ecktoria, Castra Ferrum, and the Acasian border
